data.body: Add Foolery support for Codex 5.6 Luna, Terra, and Sol using the exact Codex CLI model identifiers. Preserve the existing reasoning-effort setting for all three models, add deterministic coverage, pass lint/typecheck/tests/build, integrate to origin/main, and publish a verified patch release. Do not use a PR. Do not move this knot to a terminal state.
data.title: Add Codex 5.6 model variants and ship patch
